title: T-020 — UI: FIN-003 WO Cost Summary detail page (fin_wo_detail, §8.1)
prompt:
# T-020 — FIN-003 WO Cost Summary detail UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.1 FIN-003; §9 cascade table; §11.5 V-FIN-VAR-01..04 color coding; §13.1 events.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/wo-screens.jsx:124-366` (`fin_wo_detail`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/wos/[woId]/cost` rendering 2-column layout with WO info sidebar + main panel: Cost Summary card (border-color driven by variance %), Cost Breakdown bars + Waterfall chart, Variance Breakdown Accordion, Cascade table (when WO has children), Variance Notes list, D365 posting status badge.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/wo-screens.jsx:124-366`.
shadcn primitives: Card, CardHeader, CardContent, Table, TableRow, TableCell, Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent, Badge, Button, Separator.
Depends_on_prototypes: `variance_note_modal` (T-025 wires it in, but Add Note button must open it here).
Parity checklist:
1. Two-column grid (grid-cols-[360px_1fr]): left sidebar with WO Info Card (planned vs produced qty mini-grid); main panel.
2. Cost Summary card: dynamic `border-l-4` color class via cn({ 'border-red-500': variancePct >= 10, 'border-amber-500': pct >= 5 && pct < 10, 'border-green-500': pct < 5 }) per V-FIN-VAR-01..02.
3. Cost Breakdown bars (reused CostBreakdownBars client component) + Waterfall chart (Recharts ComposedChart) — same components reused by FIN-001 dashboard (T-031).
4. Variance Breakdown Accordion: 4 items (material/labor/overhead/waste). Phase 2 sub-components (MPV/MQV LRV/LEV) rendered as muted placeholder text with Badge 'Phase 2 — EPIC 10-I' per BL-FIN-01.
5. Cascade table: ONLY rendered when wo has children in wo_dependencies. Columns: WO Ref (Link), Own Cost, Cascade Sum, Depth.
6. Variance Notes list (chronological cards): author, category Badge, timestamp, text. 'Add Note' Button opens MODAL-07 variance_note_modal (composed from T-025 if landed, OR locally-defined inline if T-020 lands first).
7. D365 Posting Status row: pending=amber, posted=green, not-yet-closed=gray. Maps `posted_to_d365_at` + `d365_journal_id`.
8. Top toolbar: 'Recalculate' Button → calls T-016 Server Action `recalculateWoCost(woId)`. Visible only if `fin.wo_cost.recalculate` permission.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/wos/[woId]/cost/page.tsx` — RSC fetches WO + cost + cascade + variance notes + D365 posting status in parallel.
2. `app/finance/_components/cost-breakdown-bars.tsx` (shared with T-031).
3. `app/finance/_components/waterfall-chart.tsx` (shared with T-031).
4. `app/finance/wos/[woId]/cost/_components/wo-cost-detail.tsx` (main client component for variance notes + recalculate button interactivity).
5. RBAC: visible to `fin.wo_cost.view` (own line for prod_manager via RLS).

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/wos/[woId]/cost/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/wos/[woId]/cost/_components/wo-cost-detail.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/cost-breakdown-bars.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/waterfall-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/wos/[woId]/cost/_components/__tests__/wo-cost-detail.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given the page renders for a WO with cascade children, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/wo-screens.jsx:124-366, then 2-col layout + all components match — RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
- Given variance/standard >= 10%, when Cost Summary renders, then border-l-4 includes 'border-red-500'; for 5-10% 'border-amber-500'; below 5% 'border-green-500'.
- Given the WO is leaf (no cascade), when page renders, then Cascade Table is not present. AND given user without fin.wo_cost.recalculate, when page renders, then 'Recalculate' button is hidden.
- Given user clicks 'Add Note', when modal opens, then MODAL-07 renders pre-bound to woId; on save, notes list re-renders. AND given WO posted_to_d365_at non-null with d365_journal_id, when D365 row renders, then it shows 'Posted' badge + journal link.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: wo-cost-detail.test.tsx seeds WO + variance notes + cascade fixture; asserts parity + dynamic border color + cascade conditional + RBAC + Add Note flow + D365 status mapping.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/wos`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not hardcode the variance threshold colors — derive from finance_settings.variance_thresholds (P1 = display-only display thresholds 5%/10%).
- Do not use HTML `<details>` instead of shadcn Accordion.
- Do not skip the Phase 2 placeholder badges in the Variance Accordion — visibility communicates roadmap (BL-FIN-01).
- Do not regress accessibility.
- Do not show 'Recalculate' button to users without permission.
